title: BeaconCraft
description: The latest recommended or required modpack for playing on the BeaconCraft SMP
body:
This Modrinth page will (maybe?) always contain the latest required or recommended pack for playing on the BeaconCraft SMP.

In the current iteration, the pack is designed for both functionality and performance. Despite the fact it is optimized for playing on BeaconCraft specifically, it should work just fine to join any server.

This pack should also work on a dedicated server, however remains untested.
